requirement_topic.en: IMANOR Conformity Certification — CE DoC Accepted under EU Advanced Status
requirement_topic.zh: IMANOR合规认证——欧盟高级地位下接受CE符合性声明
requirement_topic.zht: IMANOR合規認證——歐盟高級地位下接受CE符合性聲明

summary.en: Morocco's Institut Marocain de Normalisation (IMANOR) administers conformity assessment for products placed on the Moroccan market. Under Morocco's EU Advanced Status association agreement, CE marking and a current EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) are broadly accepted by Moroccan customs and market-access authorities in lieu of an IMANOR-specific conformity certificate for most product categories, including heat pumps and split air-conditioners. The EU DoC and supporting technical file must cover the applicable NM standards (aligned to EN/IEC editions), be current, and be available for inspection on request. Units incorporating wireless communication modules (Wi-Fi, ZigBee, Bluetooth, etc.) require ANRT (Agence Nationale de Réglementation des Télécommunications) type-approval separately and independently of any CE DoC.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥国家标准化研究所（IMANOR）负责摩洛哥市场产品的符合性评定。根据摩洛哥欧盟高级地位联系协议，现行的欧盟CE标志和符合性声明（DoC）被摩洛哥海关及市场准入当局广泛接受，可替代包括热泵和分体空调在内的大多数产品类别的IMANOR专项合规证书。欧盟DoC及配套技术文件须涵盖适用的NM标准（与EN/IEC版本对标），保持现行有效，并可按要求供检查。含无线通信模块（Wi-Fi、ZigBee、蓝牙等）的设备须单独取得ANRT（国家电信监管局）型式批准，该义务独立于CE符合性声明。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥國家標準化研究所（IMANOR）負責摩洛哥市場產品的符合性評定。根據摩洛哥歐盟高級地位聯繫協議，現行的歐盟CE標誌和符合性聲明（DoC）被摩洛哥海關及市場准入當局廣泛接受，可替代包括熱泵和分體空調在內的大多數產品類別的IMANOR專項合規證書。歐盟DoC及配套技術文件須涵蓋適用的NM標準（與EN/IEC版本對標），保持現行有效，並可按要求供檢查。含無線通信模塊（Wi-Fi、ZigBee、藍牙等）的設備須單獨取得ANRT（國家電信監管局）型式批准，該義務獨立於CE符合性聲明。

standards_or_laws: Morocco-EU Advanced Status Association Agreement (CE DoC acceptance)
NM standards aligned to EN/IEC for heat pumps and air-conditioners
ANRT type-approval — wireless and radio communication modules

summary.en: China's CCC (China Compulsory Certification) mandatory scheme covers heat pumps and air-conditioners ≤40 kW for the domestic market, certified against GB 4706.32 and related GB safety standards. China also applies GB 25454 and GB/T 7725 for heat-pump efficiency rating (COP/SCOP), and GB 9237 provides the refrigerant safety baseline. CCC certificates and Chinese factory inspection records are domestic-market evidence only and are not recognised as conformity evidence in Morocco.
summary.zh: 中国CCC强制认证体系覆盖国内市场≤40kW的热泵和空调，依据GB 4706.32及相关GB安全标准认证。中国还以GB 25454和GB/T 7725进行热泵能效（COP/SCOP）评级，GB 9237提供制冷剂安全基线。CCC证书和中国工厂检查记录属于中国国内市场证据，不被摩洛哥认可为合规证明。
summary.zht: 中國CCC強制認證體系覆蓋國內市場≤40kW的熱泵和空調，依據GB 4706.32及相關GB安全標準認證。中國還以GB 25454和GB/T 7725進行熱泵能效（COP/SCOP）評級，GB 9237提供製冷劑安全基線。CCC證書和中國工廠檢查記錄屬於中國國內市場證據，不被摩洛哥認可為合規證明。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory for heat pumps and AC ≤40 kW in CN domestic market
GB 4706.32 — safety of heat pumps and air-conditioners
GB 25454 — heat pump water heater energy efficiency
GB/T 7725 — room air conditioner COP/SCOP performance

gap.en: CCC is not recognised in Morocco. CE DoC is the practical entry route under Morocco's EU Advanced Status. Chinese exporters without CE certification must either obtain CE marking (tested to EN 14511 / EN 14825 / EN 60335-2-40 / ErP Directive requirements as applicable) or pursue IMANOR-specific conformity assessment. ANRT type-approval is a separate and mandatory obligation for wireless-enabled units and is not covered by CE DoC. Voltage nominal differs: China 220 V vs Morocco 230 V single-phase — product suitability for 230 V 50 Hz must be confirmed.
gap.zh: CCC在摩洛哥不被认可。CE符合性声明是摩洛哥欧盟高级地位下的实际准入路径。未持有CE认证的中国出口商须取得CE标志（按适用的EN 14511 / EN 14825 / EN 60335-2-40 / 生态设计指令要求测试），或进行IMANOR专项合规评定。对于带无线功能的设备，ANRT型式批准是独立且强制的义务，不含在CE符合性声明中。电压基准有差异：中国220V对摩洛哥230V单相——需确认产品适用于230V 50Hz。
gap.zht: CCC在摩洛哥不被認可。CE符合性聲明是摩洛哥歐盟高級地位下的實際准入路徑。未持有CE認證的中國出口商須取得CE標誌（按適用的EN 14511 / EN 14825 / EN 60335-2-40 / 生態設計指令要求測試），或進行IMANOR專項合規評定。對於帶無線功能的設備，ANRT型式批准是獨立且強制的義務，不含在CE符合性聲明中。電壓基準有差異：中國220V對摩洛哥230V單相——需確認產品適用於230V 50Hz。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IMANOR conformity certificate or CE DoC required for market entry; ANRT type-approval mandatory for units with wireless communication modules
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for CN domestic market under CCC (≤40 kW); CCC not recognised in Morocco

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — CCC is not recognised in Morocco; CE DoC is the practical entry pathway under EU Advanced Status, but ANRT type-approval must be obtained separately for wireless-enabled units, and 230 V 50 Hz product suitability must be confirmed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——CCC在摩洛哥不被认可；CE符合性声明是欧盟高级地位下的实际准入路径，但带无线功能的设备须单独取得ANRT型式批准，且需确认产品适用于230V 50Hz。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——CCC在摩洛哥不被認可；CE符合性聲明是歐盟高級地位下的實際准入路徑，但帶無線功能的設備須單獨取得ANRT型式批准，且需確認產品適用於230V 50Hz。
